task_completion.description: Calculate total yarn requirements including a safety margin
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cell showing the total required yardage calculated with a safety margin (should be a value between 1540 and 1680 yards, typically 1610 for a 15% margin on a 1400-yard base).

task_completion.description: Compare costs across different yarn options
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cells showing the calculated total cost for multiple yarn options (e.g., Budget Acrylic at $29.94, Cozy Wool at $68.00, Luxury Blend at $96.00-$108.00).

task_completion.description: Use the CEILING function for rounding skeins
task_completion.visual_evidence: The formula bar displays the use of the CEILING (or ROUNDUP) function to calculate the whole number of skeins needed.
The formula bar shows a reference to another sheet (e.g., containing an exclamation mark like 'Sheet1'! or similar sheet name syntax) used in the calculations or shopping list.

task_completion.description: Create a shopping list based on the calculations
task_completion.visual_evidence: A designated section or separate sheet acting as a shopping list that specifies the chosen yarn (Budget Acrylic, as it is the cheapest), the number of skeins (6), and the total cost ($29.94).

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI spreadsheet application
integrity.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application (like LibreOffice Calc, Google Sheets, or Excel) is visible in the screenshots, not a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Calculations are performed by the spreadsheet software
integrity.visual_evidence: Formulas are visible in the formula bar when cells are selected, indicating the agent didn't just type the final hardcoded numbers.

integrity.description: No terminal scripts were used to bypass GUI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing Python scripts or CLI tools being used to generate the spreadsheet file directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The base yardage for a Medium project is 1400 yards. With a valid 10-20% safety margin, the total required yardage should be between 1540 and 1680 yards (1610 for 15%). The cheapest option is Budget Acrylic, which requires 6 skeins (at 280 yards/skein) for a total cost of $29.94. Cozy Wool would cost $68.00 (8 skeins) and Luxury Blend $96.00-$108.00 (8-9 skeins). The agent must use the CEILING (or ROUNDUP) function to calculate whole skeins, and cross-sheet formulas must be used.
